data.title: Create resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh and update SKILL.md resume scan to call it
data.description:
## Story
d187-aa91 — Integration test fixture for interrupted-session recovery

## testing_mode
GREEN

## What

### 1. Create plugins/dso/scripts/resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh
New executable shell script that implements the single-branch + tiebreak resume scan logic from stories 930f-8991 and 7de2-f557:

```bash
# Usage: resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh <ticket-id>
# Reads WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comments on <ticket-id> and all child tickets,
# identifies unmatched starts, and autonomously merges or discards each branch.
```

Logic to implement:
- Enumerate top-level ticket + children via `ticket list` filtered by parent_id
- For each ticket: parse WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comments, find unmatched branches
- Single branch: merge/discard/skip/retroactive-:complete per 930f-8991 logic
- Multiple competing branches: apply 4-stage tiebreak cascade per 7de2-f557 logic
- Clean up mid-merge state with `git merge --abort` if MERGE_HEAD exists

### 2. Update sprint/SKILL.md and fix-bug/SKILL.md
Modify WORKTREE_TRACKING Resume Scan sub-steps to call the script instead of inlining git commands:
```
Run: .claude/scripts/dso resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh <ticket-id>
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ccff-a145 integration tests pass GREEN
- [ ] resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
- [ ] Script handles: branch-not-found, already-merged, mid-merge abort, unique-commits merge, conflict discard, multiple-branch tiebreak
- [ ] sprint/SKILL.md and fix-bug/SKILL.md resume scan sections call resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh via .claude/scripts/dso shim
- [ ] No hardcoded plugin paths in the script (use _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern)
